title: festuca sulcata f. hirsuta
intro: Festuca sulcata f. hirsuta, also known as hairy sulcate fescue, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Festuca sulcata f. hirsuta can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and effects.
